title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Curriculum Developer in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
